SEARCH
Package com.example.eventplanner

Class EventRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventplanner.EventRepository
public class EventRepository extends Object
Repository for CRUD and waitlist operations on Event documents in Firestore.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    EventRepository.CountCallback
    Callback interface for fetching the number of entrants on a waitlist.
    static interface 
    EventRepository.EntrantsCallback
    Callback interface for fetching a list of entrants.
    static interface 
    EventRepository.EventCallback
    Callback interface for fetching a single event.
    static interface 
    EventRepository.EventsCallback
    Callback interface for fetching a list of events.
    static interface 
    EventRepository.SimpleCallback
    Callback interface for successful and failed operations.
    static interface 
    EventRepository.WaitlistStatusCallback
    Callback interface for checking if a user is on a waitlist.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventRepository()
    Initializes the repository with a Firestore instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    acceptEntrant(String eventId, String userId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Moves a user from pendingEntrants to chosenEntrants when they accept an invitation.
    void
    addCoOrganizer(String eventId, String deviceId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Adds a user as a co-organizer to an event.
    void
    cancelEntrant(String eventId, String userId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Moves a user from pendingEntrants to cancelledEntrants when they decline or are cancelled.
    void
    createEvent(Events event, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Creates a new event document in Firestore.
    void
    deleteEvent(String eventId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Deletes an event document from Firestore.
    void
    drawFromWaitlist(String eventId, int count, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Draws a specified number of random entrants from the waitingList, moves them to pendingEntrants, and creates "invited" registration records.
    void
    fetchAllEvents(EventRepository.EventsCallback cb)
    Fetches all events from Firestore.
    void
    fetchEventById(String eventId, EventRepository.EventCallback cb)
    Fetches an event document from Firestore by its ID.
    void
    fetchOpenEvents(EventRepository.EventsCallback cb)
    Fetches all open events from Firestore.
    void
    fetchWaitlistEntrants(String eventId, EventRepository.EntrantsCallback cb)
    Fetches all entrants for an event.
    void
    isOnWaitingList(String eventId, String deviceId, EventRepository.WaitlistStatusCallback cb)
    Checks if a user is on the waitingList of an event.
    void
    joinWaitingList(String eventId, String deviceId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Adds a user to the waitingList of an event.
    void
    leaveWaitingList(String eventId, String deviceId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Removes a user from the waitingList of an event.
    com.google.firebase.firestore.ListenerRegistration
    listenToWaitlistCount(String eventId, EventRepository.CountCallback cb)
    Fetches the number of entrants on the waitingList of an event.
    void
    removeEntrantCompletely(String eventId, String userId, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Removes a user from all entrant arrays (waitingList, pendingEntrants, chosenEntrants, cancelledEntrants).
    void
    updateEvent(Events event, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Updates an event document in Firestore.
    void
    updateGeolocationRequired(String eventId, boolean geolocationRequired, EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
    Updates the geolocationRequired field of an event.

    • acceptEntrant

      public void acceptEntrant(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String userId, @NonNull EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
      Moves a user from pendingEntrants to chosenEntrants when they accept an invitation.

    • cancelEntrant

      public void cancelEntrant(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String userId, @NonNull EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
      Moves a user from pendingEntrants to cancelledEntrants when they decline or are cancelled.

    • drawFromWaitlist

      public void drawFromWaitlist(@NonNull String eventId, int count, @NonNull EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
      Draws a specified number of random entrants from the waitingList, moves them to pendingEntrants, and creates "invited" registration records.

    • removeEntrantCompletely

      public void removeEntrantCompletely(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String userId, @NonNull EventRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
      Removes a user from all entrant arrays (waitingList, pendingEntrants, chosenEntrants, cancelledEntrants). Used when a user becomes a co-organizer to ensure they are no longer in the entrant pool.
